title: Chemoselective acylation of amines, thiols and phenols using 2,4,6-triacyloxy-1,3,5-triazine (TAT) as a new and effective reagent under mild condition
author: Somnath S. Gholap
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Post Graduate Department and Research Centre, P. V. P. College, Pravaranagar (Loni Kd.), Ahmednagar-413 713, 

 Maharashtra, India 

  E-mail:  ssgholap2002@yahoo.com 

 Department of Chemistry Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University, Aurangabad-431 004, 

 Maharashtra, India 

  Manuscript received 14 November 2007, revised 30 June 2008, accepted 24 September 2008  

  A facile chemoselective acylation of amines, thiols and phenols using 2,4,6-triacyloxy-1,3,5-triazine (TAT) under mild condition is described. New reagent, high product yield, short reaction time, ease of operation and solvent free reaction condition is the most acceptable feature of the present method.
